"Hey, any suggestions on a city in Europe that's perfect for a family of four, with a spacious room, and easy access to kid-friendly attractions?" - David.
Model B

The perfect city for a family of four is Copenhagen, Denmark. It has a spacious room, easy access to kid-friendly attractions, and is generally a child-friendly city. Some popular attractions for families include the Copenhagen Zoo, the Botanical Gardens, the Tycho Brahe Planetarium, and the David Collection. For a more local experience, try some of the smaller museums and galleries throughout the city.

Paris is a culinary paradise with a wide range of dining options. You can find traditional French bistros, upscale restaurants, street food stalls, and international cuisine. Some popular areas for dining include the Marais, the Latin Quarter, and the Canal Saint-Martin. For a more local experience, try a traditional pastry shop or a wine bar. Be sure to sample the city's specialties, such ascaux, cassoulet, and quenelle. For a sweet treat, try a macaron or a chocolate-covered pastry. The most popular attraction in Paris is the Eiffel Tower. With over 3.5 million visitors per year, the Eiffel Tower is a must-see landmark. It offers stunning views of the city, including the ability to glimpse the Arc de Triomphe and Notre-Dame Cathedral. You can also enjoy a meal at the restaurant at the top of the tower or visit the nearby Versailles Palace and its gardens. If you're interested in seeing the city's nightlife, you can explore the bars and clubs around Rue de la Juiverie and Rue de l'Etoile.
